summary: Iteration 72 - Google Maps Clear Key Button + Real Mode Testing. Backend: 31/31 tests passed (12 new + 19 existing). Frontend: Admin Google Maps card working correctly with 'Key'i Temizle' button visible, clickable, and styled appropriately.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminSystemSettings.js: 'Key'i Temizle' button correctly implemented with data-testid='system-settings-google-maps-clear-key', red/rose border styling, and handleClearGoogleMapsKey function
Backend POST /api/admin/system-settings/google-maps: clear_api_key=true correctly deletes api_setting record while preserving country_codes
Backend _normalize_google_place_details: country_code uses short_name with [:2].upper() ensuring proper 2-letter code (fixes DE vs AL/Germany bug)
Real mode endpoints /api/places/postal-lookup and /api/places/details working correctly with live Google Maps key

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Google Maps card, Clear Key button, Save/Refresh buttons all working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Google Maps admin settings fully working including clear_api_key functionality. Backend uses real Google Maps API when key is configured (real_mode=true in places/config). Country code normalization uses short_name from address_components ensuring 2-letter ISO code.

admin_google_maps_clear_key_button.behavior: Sends POST with clear_api_key=true, deletes api_key setting, preserves country_codes

clear_api_key_backend.result: Deletes api_setting record, returns key_configured=false, api_key_masked=''

real_mode_postal_lookup.with_key: Returns mode='real', item with coordinates, streets list

real_mode_places_details.with_key: Returns mode='real', normalized item with 2-letter country_code
real_mode_places_details.country_code_normalization: Uses short_name from components, sliced to 2 chars uppercase
